---
title: "Session 16"
author: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "Feb 11, 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---

## PDF of t-dist, write fn to calculate t-stat and p-value

```{r}
set.seed(42)

# sample size, less than 30
n <- 8
# mean of Null hypothesis
mu_null <- 0
#true sd used for simulation
sigma_true <- 1
```

```{r}
#define student's t-test density formula
t_Density <- function(t,df){
  coef <- gamma ((df + 1)/2)
}
```

```{r}
Plot
# different color for different df
```

```{r}
# Stimulate data and compute t statistic
x <- rnorm(n, )
```

```{r}
Visualize observed t on the null t dist
plot ()
```

 
```{r}
# Calculate p-value 
```
 
```{r}
# verify the built-in pt() fn
```
 
```{r}
# Quick interpretation helper <- if p_value < alpha) "Reject H0" else "Fail to reject H0"

cat("\n ---- Step 8: Interpretation ---\n")

alpha <- 0.05
decision

alpha line for p-value
)
```
